issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Platformer player actor with sprite animations and jump
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Actor with CollisionType.Active, SpriteSheet.fromImageSource, Animation.fromSpriteSheet, onPreUpdate with engine.input.keyboard, and postcollision side detection; baseline uses generic loops without the documented lifecycle hooks or collision events.

scenarios.name: Loading a Tiled map with spawn points and coin objects
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses TiledResource from @excaliburjs/plugin-tiled, addToScene, getObjectsByName/getObjectsByType, and camera.strategy.elasticToActor; baseline writes generic Tiled parsing without the plugin's documented methods.
